challenge_type: Web3 AI agent memory and verifiable data track
language_source_sample: Sui Overflow 2026 is Sui's flagship global hackathon, bringing together builders worldwide to ship real, production-ready applications.
user_requested_language: zh for agent discussion; English for project artifacts
project_language_reason: DeepSurge event and expected submission fields are English; code, UI, README, video, and submission copy stay English.

event_public_criteria: projects built to last beyond the event
walrus_track_criteria: functional AI agent or agent workflow
durable data or file access through Walrus
shared context or portable memory across tools, teams, sessions, or workflows
Walrus or MemWal on the critical path rather than as a storage badge

sponsor_or_domain_primitives: Sui object metadata for Walrus proof inspection
AI agent successor restore from durable scoped memory
demo_format: public live URL plus short combined pitch/demo video and paste-ready submission copy
must_prove_before_submission: judge-triggered Memory Will write to Walrus
cold successor restore reads Walrus before answering
receipt reopens in a second browser context
Sui object metadata appears in the proof panel
failed pointer or missing receipt returns no-success

web3_hook_contest.required_wallet_or_frontend: No-wallet exception for server-issued Walrus storage proof in P0
web3_hook_contest.mainnet_testnet_calibration: Walrus/Sui testnet proof is acceptable for hackathon verification

killer_proof_phrase: A cold successor replay shows only approved memory.
judge_recall_requirement: At least 2 of 3 cold judges can recall user + Walrus/Sui sponsor proof + outcome + visible artifact after 10 seconds.
primary_sponsor_centrality_requirement: >=8.5/10 and removing Walrus breaks the restore outcome.
target_user_or_community: teams running long AI research, sales, legal, or product work that must survive agent death and scoped handoff
winner_slot_sentence: We are trying to win Special - Walrus by proving a killed AI task can resume in a cold successor from approved Walrus memory.
hard_disqualifiers: Walrus appears only as optional upload or storage appendix
success is shown when Walrus read fails
public demo has no fresh-user path

proof_paths_ranked.target: Walrus blob id and Sui object metadata in the receipt proof panel
proof_paths_ranked.how_to_get_before_submission: Run public kill -> write -> restore -> inspect path and save runtime report.

proof_paths_ranked.target: Cross-browser runtime audit with mobile, reload, second context, and no-success recovery
proof_paths_ranked.how_to_get_before_submission: Run audit_runtime_interaction against the public URL.

proof_paths_ranked.target: Judge can operate the public URL without builder browser state
proof_paths_ranked.how_to_get_before_submission: Public smoke and README first-action section.

kill_or_mutate_rules: Kill if restore can succeed without a Walrus read.
Mutate if the first 30 seconds becomes a proof dashboard instead of the Kill Agent action.
Do not optimize for DeepBook, payments, or broad Agentic Web story.
